productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Pack of 3 White Socks
description: Set of three in white with white and grey cuffs It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these socks from 2Go. Made of soft cotton knit fabric, these socks can be worn both for sporting events and casual days out. Made of 100% ultra premium cotton fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Lycra in the cuff for better stretch Padded footbed for cushioned comfort Engineered with technology for shape retention, no sag and no elastic marks Rib knit mouth with branding and a roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability Sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degree using mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
